name: iot-realm-mcp-server
description: 🌐🔌 An MCP server that exposes real-time sensor data from IoT Realm devices—such as ESP32-based DHT11 clients—to LLMs via the Model Context Protocol. This enables AI agents to access, analyze, and act upon live environmental data.
